title: hieracium subramosum subsp. prolatatum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. prolatatum, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Hieracium subramosum subsp. prolatatum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal medicine, Hieracium subramosum subsp. prolatatum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
